query: How long does a commercial construction project take?
answer_block:
How long does a commercial construction project take?

A commercial construction project in Texas typically runs from 3-6 months for a tenant improvement / build-out up to 14-22 months for a hotel, depending on project type. A warehouse / industrial shell takes 6-10 months, a retail shell / strip center 7-11 months, a single-story office 9-13 months, and a medical or dental facility 12-18 months. Duration breaks across four phases — design and planning, pre-construction, construction, and completion and handover — with permitting, material lead times, labor availability, and weather the main drivers of schedule variance.

Project typeTypical durationCost per sq ft
Tenant improvement / build-out3-6 months$50-$200 per sq ft
Warehouse / industrial shell6-10 months$115-$335 per sq ft
Retail shell / strip center7-11 months$250-$380 per sq ft
Single-story office9-13 months$305-$445 per sq ft
Medical or dental facility12-18 months$350-$800 per sq ft
Hotel14-22 months$500-$930 per sq ft

A commercial construction project in Texas typically runs from 3-6 months for a tenant improvement / build-out up to 14-22 months for a hotel, depending on project type. A warehouse / industrial shell takes 6-10 months, a retail shell / strip center 7-11 months, a single-story office 9-13 months, and a medical or dental facility 12-18 months. Duration breaks across four phases — design and planning, pre-construction, construction, and completion and handover — with permitting, material lead times, labor availability, and weather the main drivers of schedule variance.

Commercial construction timeline by project type (Texas 2026):
- Tenant improvement / build-out: 3-6 months | $50-$200 per sq ft
- Warehouse / industrial shell: 6-10 months | $115-$335 per sq ft
- Retail shell / strip center: 7-11 months | $250-$380 per sq ft
- Single-story office: 9-13 months | $305-$445 per sq ft
- Medical or dental facility: 12-18 months | $350-$800 per sq ft
- Hotel: 14-22 months | $500-$930 per sq ft
